compiled_state.title: Integrate test quality overlay into review workflow dispatch
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Wire the test quality overlay into the existing overlay dispatch infrastructure.

### Steps
1. Update plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh to handle test_quality_overlay
2. Update plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4b to include test quality overlay
3. Update plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh to accept test quality findings
4. Remove .test-index RED marker

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh — Edit
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md — Edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/resolve-overlay-findings.sh — Edit
- .test-index — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Overlay dispatch handles test_quality_overlay
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality" plugins/dso/scripts/overlay-dispatch.sh
- [ ] Review workflow documents test quality overlay
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: overlay-dispatch.sh, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, resolve-overlay-findings.sh, .test-index, review-complexity-classifier.sh, classifier-tier-output.md; exemplars: security/performance overlay pattern in overlay-dispatch.sh and REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ (existing RED tests are now GREEN — classifier emits test_quality_overlay, agent file exists, overlay dispatch tests pass)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: overlay-dispatch.sh, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, resolve-overlay-findings.sh. Tests: 7/7 pass.
comments.author: Test
